user_prompt: Generate cookie consent banner copy that complies with both GDPR and ePrivacy.
actual_output:
Below is GDPR/ePrivacy-oriented cookie consent banner copy you can adapt. *Compliance guidance only, not legal advice; have counsel/DPO review for your jurisdiction and actual cookie stack.*

## 1. First-Layer Cookie Banner Copy

### Option A — Balanced / Standard

**Title:** We use cookies and similar technologies

**Body:**  
We use necessary cookies to make our website work. With your consent, we also use optional cookies and similar technologies for analytics, personalization, and marketing. These help us understand how our site is used, improve our services, and show relevant content.

You can accept all optional cookies, reject all optional cookies, or manage your choices by category. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time via our Cookie Settings link.

**Buttons:**
- **Accept all**
- **Reject all**
- **Manage choices**

**Footer link:**  
[Cookie Policy] [Privacy Notice]

---

### Option B — More Conservative

**Title:** Cookie choices

**Body:**  
We use strictly necessary cookies to provide our website and services. We will only use analytics, personalization, and marketing cookies if you consent. You can choose which categories to allow, and you can change or withdraw your consent at any time.

**Buttons:**
- **Accept all**
- **Reject non-essential**
- **Customize settings**

**Footer link:**  
Learn more in our [Cookie Policy] and [Privacy Notice].

---

## 2. Cookie Preference Center Copy

### Header

**Cookie settings**

Manage your cookie preferences below. Strictly necessary cookies are always active because they are required for the website to function. Optional cookies will only be used if you give consent. You may change or withdraw your consent at any time.

---

### Category 1 — Strictly Necessary Cookies

**Status:** Always active

**Description:**  
These cookies are required for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually set in response to actions you take, such as logging in, setting privacy preferences, filling in forms, maintaining security, or remembering items in your basket. They do not require consent under ePrivacy rules, but we still provide information about them.

**Legal basis:**  
GDPR Article 6(1)(f), legitimate interests, or Article 6(1)(b), performance of a contract, depending on the cookie purpose.

---

### Category 2 — Analytics Cookies

**Status:** Optional toggle — default off

**Description:**  
These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website, such as which pages are visited and whether users experience errors. We use this information to improve our website and services.

**Legal basis:**  
Consent under ePrivacy rules and GDPR Article 6(1)(a), where cookies or similar technologies are not strictly necessary.

**Toggle label:**  
Allow analytics cookies

---

### Category 3 — Personalization Cookies

**Status:** Optional toggle — default off

**Description:**  
These cookies remember your choices and preferences, such as language, region, or customized content, so we can provide a more personalized experience.

**Legal basis:**  
Consent under ePrivacy rules and GDPR Article 6(1)(a), unless a specific preference cookie is strictly necessary to provide a user-requested service.

**Toggle label:**  
Allow personalization cookies

---

### Category 4 — Marketing Cookies

**Status:** Optional toggle — default off

**Description:**  
These cookies may be set by us or our advertising partners to build a profile of your interests, measure advertising campaigns, and show you relevant ads on our site or other websites. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less personalized advertising.

**Legal basis:**  
Consent under ePrivacy rules and GDPR Article 6(1)(a).

**Toggle label:**  
Allow marketing cookies

---

### Category 5 — Social Media Cookies / Pixels

**Status:** Optional toggle — default off

**Description:**  
These cookies and similar technologies are used when we embed social media content or enable sharing features. Social media providers may use these technologies to track your browsing across websites and build profiles based on your interests.

**Legal basis:**  
Consent under ePrivacy rules and GDPR Article 6(1)(a).

**Toggle label:**  
Allow social media cookies

---

## 3. Preference Center Buttons

Use clear, equally prominent choices:

- **Save choices**
- **Accept all**
- **Reject all optional cookies**

Avoid designs where “Accept all” is more prominent than “Reject all” unless local guidance permits it. Many EU regulators expect rejection to be as easy as acceptance.

---

## 4. Short Cookie Policy Notice

You can include this in your Cookie Policy:

> We use cookies and similar technologies to operate our website, improve performance, analyze traffic, personalize content, and support marketing. Some cookies are strictly necessary and are used without consent because they are required to provide the website or a service you request. Optional cookies, including analytics, personalization, marketing, and social media cookies, are only used if you consent.  
>
> You can give, refuse, or withdraw your consent at any time using the Cookie Settings link available on our website. Withdrawing consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before withdrawal.

---

## 5. Implementation Requirements

To align with GDPR and ePrivacy expectations:

| Requirement | GDPR / ePrivacy basis | Action |
|---|---:|---|
| No optional cookies before consent | ePrivacy + GDPR Art. 6(1)(a), Art. 7 | Block analytics, marketing, personalization, and pixels until opt-in |
| Consent must be freely given, specific, informed, unambiguous | GDPR Art. 4(11), Art. 7 | Use clear affirmative action; no pre-ticked boxes |
| Easy withdrawal | GDPR Art. 7(3) | Provide persistent “Cookie Settings” link |
| Equal ease to accept/reject | GDPR Art. 7; EDPB guidance | Include “Reject all” on first layer |
| Granular choices | GDPR Art. 5(1)(a), Art. 7 | Allow category-level consent |
| Record consent | GDPR Art. 5(2), Art. 7(1) | Log consent state, timestamp, version, region, and categories |
| Provide transparent information | GDPR Arts. 12–13 | List cookie names, providers, purposes, durations, and third-party access |
| Avoid consent bundling | GDPR Art. 7(4) | Do not make optional cookies a condition of service unless strictly necessary |

---

## 6. Recommended First-Layer Final Copy

**We use cookies**

We use strictly necessary cookies to make our website work. With your consent, we also use optional cookies and similar technologies for analytics, personalization, and marketing. You can accept all, reject all optional cookies, or manage your choices by category. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time through Cookie Settings.

**Buttons:**  
**Reject all** | **Manage choices** | **Accept all**

**Links:**  
Cookie Policy | Privacy Notice
judge_reasoning: The chatbot provided comprehensive, high-quality cookie banner copy and implementation guidance that directly fulfilled the user's request while adhering to its persona's constraints.
